## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Build or release tooling

## Testing

<!-- Commands run, screenshots, traces, or notes. -->

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `npm run build` in `desktop-shell/`
- [ ] Not applicable

## Agent Runtime Impact

- [ ] Agent loop or prompts
- [ ] Tool behavior or approval boundaries
- [ ] Local state, memory, skills, or sessions
- [ ] Desktop bridge or event stream
- [ ] No runtime behavior change

## Privacy And Safety

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, local runtime state, private logs, or generated private data.
- [ ] I updated docs if commands, configuration, or behavior changed.
- [ ] I included screenshots or traces for visible UI/runtime changes where useful.
